_comment: Add the entries below to the 'mcpServers' object in ~/.claude.json (top-level, alongside any existing servers).
_comment_2: The 'obsidian-local' entry needs the Local REST API plugin installed in Obsidian and the API key pasted in.
_comment_3: The 'vault-fs-remote' entry talks to the Proxmox LXC at <your-lxc-ip> (or wherever you put it) and needs no Obsidian app.
